us_markets.note: Friday pre-market / futures session — risk-off triggered
us_markets.key_story: S&P/Nasdaq futures tumble Friday as tech trade cools, yields surge. 30yr tops 5.1% for first time in nearly a year. Trump-Xi summit Day 2: Trump declines to commit to defending Taiwan. Cerebras IPO +68% on Thurs debut. Fed Chair Warsh rate path concerns persist.

asia_markets.note: Friday Asia close — Kospi record, Nikkei higher
asia_markets.key_event: Trump-Xi Beijing summit Day 2. Trump 'I don't talk about' defending Taiwan. Kospi hits 8,000 record. Strait of Hormuz commitment maintained.

evening_headlines.title: Trump told Xi 'I don't talk about' whether US would defend Taiwan
S&P, Nasdaq futures tumble as tech trade cools, yields surge
30-year Treasury yield tops 5.1%, highest in nearly a year
Starbucks to lay off 300 US employees, shutter regional offices
Stock market surge delivers rare signal — Goldman Sachs on history
